H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: n=73, mean=6.55, std=1.80, confidence=strong; central cluster 6‑8, 52% positive. Highest YouTube reach (29 views), indicating broader discovery.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: Popular for overstimulation; many notice improvement, and it reaches the widest audience on YouTube.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: n=58, mean=6.71, std=1.85, confidence=strong; distribution shifts upward, 62% positive. Views=5; retention data pending.
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Offers a noticeable calm after about ten minutes; listeners report varied music feelings.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: n=44, mean=6.98, std=1.78, confidence=meaningful; tight clustering near 7‑9, 61% positive. Views=8; modest reach.
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: Highest scores in this line; listeners often feel better within five minutes, especially at night.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: n=65, mean=7.14, std=1.89, confidence=strong; distribution peaks 7‑9, 62% positive. Qualitative reports strong improvement; YouTube views=5 (low reach).
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: Most listeners felt stronger relief from anxiety, noticing benefits within about ten minutes.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: n=51, mean=6.90, std=1.63, confidence=strong; unimodal around 7, 67% positive. Mixed music opinions; views=6.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: A solid anxiety calmer; many felt better quickly, though some were neutral on the music.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: n=38, mean=6.97, std=1.81, confidence=meaningful; no bimodality detected, 61% positive. Longer settle times noted; views=4.
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Works well for therapy‑focused sessions; improvements show up after roughly ten minutes.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: n=48, mean=6.35, std=1.71, confidence=meaningful; modest spread, 52% positive. High qualitative 'significant improvement' count; views=6.
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: In crisis moments, several people reported a big lift, with calm arriving in about five minutes.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: n=35, mean=6.14, std=1.67, confidence=meaningful; lower mean, 46% positive. Mixed music feedback suggests auditory refinement; views=4.
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Mixed results in acute distress; some liked the sound, others felt less impact.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: n=29, mean=6.31, std=1.85, confidence=meaningful; wide spread, 48% positive. Immediate settlement reported; views=5.
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: A few users settled right away, but overall the effect was modest in crisis settings.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: n=61, mean=6.97, std=1.89, confidence=strong; spread across 5‑10, 61% positive. Views=4; qualitative notes fast settlement.
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Reliable for sleep prep; most people feel calmer quickly and stay settled.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: n=47, mean=7.04, std=1.46, confidence=meaningful; lowest std in dataset, 68% positive. Mixed caregiver feedback; views=5.
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Very consistent sleep aid; almost everyone reports a similar steady improvement.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: n=33, mean=7.03, std=1.57, confidence=meaningful; consistent with L1/L2, 64% positive. Views=3; some rhythm 'busy' comments.
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Keeps performing well for sleep, though a few find the rhythm a bit busy.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: n=42, mean=6.40, std=1.77, confidence=meaningful; 55% positive. Mixed 'slight improvement' feedback; views=5.
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Provides modest focus help; users often describe a slight edge in concentration.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: n=32, mean=7.09, std=1.51, confidence=meaningful; 66% positive, clear performance bump; views=4.
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Focus improves noticeably; many report sharper attention during tasks.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: n=22, mean=6.23, std=1.38, confidence=meaningful; dip to 45% positive despite many significant‑improvement reports; views=12.
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: Contrast: scores dip but many still say it helped a lot, suggesting hidden benefits.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: n=38, mean=6.66, std=1.63, confidence=meaningful; modest spread, 53% positive. Qualitative leans toward slight improvement; views=2.
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Gentle boost to creativity; many notice only slight changes while using it.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: n=24, mean=6.58, std=1.28, confidence=meaningful; tighter distribution, 54% positive. Views=2; early signal of consistency.
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Creative flow lifts are clearer here; several listeners love the music.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=7.17, std=1.15, confidence=developing; narrow cluster, 67% positive. Small n but strong qualitative reports; views=7.
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Strong creative lift reported; despite small group, most feel a noticeable boost.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: n=29, mean=7.17, std=1.31, confidence=meaningful; 69% positive, low variance; views=3.
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Excellent for mental balance; listeners feel a steady, positive shift.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: n=22, mean=6.59, std=1.97, confidence=meaningful; high variance (1.97) suggests sub‑group effects; 59% positive; views=4.
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Balanced effects vary more; some feel the rhythm is a little busy.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: n=15, mean=6.87, std=1.64, confidence=developing; 73% positive but small n; some non‑settling reports; views=3.
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Early signs are positive for balance, though a few never felt settled.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: n=35, mean=6.29, std=1.71, confidence=meaningful; 43% positive, notable qualitative improvement despite modest mean; views=5.
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Mood and energy lift is mild; over half notice real benefit despite average scores.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere: n=25, mean=6.48, std=1.64, confidence=meaningful; 60% positive, some rapid settle reports; views=8.
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Better mood lift, especially for morning or therapeutic use; many report quick settling.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=6.28, std=1.74, confidence=developing; 56% positive, consistent with ASCENT variance; views=4.
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Consistent mood support with typical ascent variability; some feel uplift, others not.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: n=21, mean=6.24, std=1.97, confidence=meaningful; 43% positive, wide spread; views=4.
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Motivation lift is modest; many still feel a little better after use.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: n=14, mean=6.00, std=1.57, confidence=developing; lowest mean and 36% positive; longer settle times reported; views=7.
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Motivation response is weakest; listeners often need a longer wait for any lift.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: n=12, mean=6.92, std=2.31, confidence=developing; high variance hints at mixed response; 58% positive; views=7.
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Variable motivation effects; some report a strong lift while others see none.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: n=24, mean=6.62, std=1.56, confidence=meaningful; 50% positive, two outlier worsened responses; views=8.
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Generally helps clarity, though a couple of listeners felt worse.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: n=17, mean=6.59, std=1.37, confidence=developing; 53% positive, tight spread; views=11 (best reach in MC line).
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Clarity support feels steady; many love the sound and settle quickly.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: n=10, mean=5.60, std=2.32, confidence=developing; high dispersion suggests bimodal pattern; 50% positive; views=8.
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Mixed reactions; some get a boost, others notice little change.

sphere_commentary.overview:
The data suggest HEALING delivers the most reliable outcomes, while THRIVING shows mixed consistency and TRANSFORMING exhibits the greatest variability.
• HEALING (n=582) averages 6.78 with low dispersion across DESCENT protocols.
• THRIVING (n=242) averages 6.73 but some HOLD protocols dip unexpectedly.
• TRANSFORMING (n=176) averages 6.36 and shows wide spread, especially in ASCENT tiers.
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
Performance patterns largely follow the intended protocol architectures.
• DESCENT (HEALING) yields steady, high means and tight clusters.
• HOLD (THRIVING) generally stable, yet T‑FC‑L3 breaks the upward trend.
• ASCENT (TRANSFORMING) displays the widest outcome range, with several low‑scoring L2/L3 entries.
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
A few protocols deviate from expected phi‑sigmoid progression, warranting deeper review.
• X‑MC‑L3 (mean 5.6, std 2.32, n 10) shows a possible bimodal response.
• T‑FC‑L3 (mean 6.23, n 22) underperforms its L1/L2 peers.
• X‑MD‑L2 (mean 6.0, pct_pos 36%) records the lowest positivity across TRANSFORMING.
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
Targeted refinements emerge from convergent evidence across analyzers.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] X‑MC‑L3 – investigate listener sub‑groups and consider redesigning the auditory layer.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] T‑FC‑L3 – shorten or intensify the HOLD phase to match earlier levels.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] X‑MD‑L2 – add a longer pre‑ascent descent segment and adjust rhythm pacing.
• H‑CR‑L2/L3 – refine music/rhythm profile for crisis contexts based on mixed listener feedback.
• H‑SL‑L2 – leverage its unusually low variance as a benchmark for protocol consistency.
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding signals are limited to the current run.
• CROSS‑RUN DRIFT: Insufficient run history for drift analysis.
• CROSS‑PROTOCOL SEMANTIC CLUSTERS: DESCENT, HOLD, and ASCENT groups align with series categories.
• Confidence note: Embedding volume modest; conclusions tentative.
